content.json:
# AI Foundry — Nightly Safety & Quality Evals
_Central dashboard for all Foundry project evaluation results._

parameters.name: Project
parameters.label: Project
parameters.query: FoundryEvals_CL | summarize by FoundryProjectName_s | sort by FoundryProjectName_s asc

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| summarize EvalRuns = dcount(EvalRunId_s), Projects = dcount(FoundryProjectName_s), TotalChecks = count(), Passed = countif(Passed_b == true), Failed = countif(Passed_b != true)
| extend PassRate = round(100.0 * Passed / TotalChecks, 1)
| project rows = pack_array(
    pack('Metric', '🔄 Eval Runs', 'Value', toreal(EvalRuns)),
    pack('Metric', '📁 Projects', 'Value', toreal(Projects)),
    pack('Metric', '✅ Passed', 'Value', toreal(Passed)),
    pack('Metric', '❌ Failed', 'Value', toreal(Failed)),
    pack('Metric', '📊 Pass Rate %', 'Value', PassRate))
| mv-expand rows
| project Metric = tostring(rows['Metric']), Value = toreal(rows['Value'])
content.title: Key Metrics

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| summarize PassRate = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1) by Evaluator = EvaluatorName_s
| order by PassRate asc
content.title: Pass Rate by Evaluator

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where TargetType_s == 'project'
| summarize 
    ['Avg Score'] = round(avg(Score_d), 3),
    ['Pass Rate %'] = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1),
    Checks = count(),
    Passed = countif(Passed_b == true),
    Failed = countif(Passed_b != true)
  by ['Project Name'] = TargetName_s, ['Resource Group'] = ResourceGroup_s
| project ['Project Name'], ['Resource Group'], ['Avg Score'], ['Pass Rate %'], Checks, Passed, Failed
| order by ['Pass Rate %'] asc, ['Project Name'] asc
content.title: Project Performance
content.noDataMessage: No project evaluations found in this time range.

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where TargetType_s == 'model'
| summarize 
    ['Avg Score'] = round(avg(Score_d), 3),
    ['Pass Rate %'] = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1),
    Checks = count(),
    Passed = countif(Passed_b == true),
    Failed = countif(Passed_b != true),
    Version = max(TargetVersion_s)
  by ['Model Name'] = TargetName_s, ['Account'] = FoundryProjectName_s
| project ['Model Name'], ['Account'], Version, ['Avg Score'], ['Pass Rate %'], Checks, Passed, Failed
| order by ['Pass Rate %'] asc, ['Model Name'] asc
content.title: Model Performance
content.noDataMessage: No model evaluations found in this time range.

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where TargetType_s == 'agent'
| summarize 
    ['Avg Score'] = round(avg(Score_d), 3),
    ['Pass Rate %'] = round(100.0 * countif(Passed_b == true) / count(), 1),
    Checks = count(),
    Passed = countif(Passed_b == true),
    Failed = countif(Passed_b != true),
    Version = max(TargetVersion_s)
  by ['Agent Name'] = TargetName_s, Project = FoundryProjectName_s
| project ['Agent Name'], Project, Version, ['Avg Score'], ['Pass Rate %'], Checks, Passed, Failed
| order by ['Pass Rate %'] asc, ['Agent Name'] asc
content.title: Agent Performance
content.noDataMessage: No agent evaluations found in this time range. Deploy agents in your Foundry projects to see them here.

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| summarize 
    ['Avg Score'] = round(avg(Score_d), 3),
    ['Min'] = round(min(Score_d), 3),
    ['Max'] = round(max(Score_d), 3),
    ['Checks'] = count(),
    ['Passed'] = countif(Passed_b == true),
    ['Failed'] = countif(Passed_b != true)
  by Evaluator = EvaluatorName_s, Category = EvaluatorCategory_s
| extend ['Pass Rate %'] = round(100.0 * Passed / Checks, 1)
| project Evaluator, Category, ['Avg Score'], ['Min'], ['Max'], ['Pass Rate %'], Checks, Passed, Failed
| order by ['Pass Rate %'] asc, Evaluator asc
content.title: Performance by Evaluator

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| summarize AvgScore = round(avg(Score_d), 3) by Project = FoundryProjectName_s, Evaluator = EvaluatorName_s
| evaluate pivot(Evaluator, max(AvgScore))
| order by Project asc
content.title: Score Heatmap

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| where Passed_b != true
| project 
    Time = TimeGenerated,
    Project = FoundryProjectName_s, 
    Target = TargetName_s, 
    Evaluator = EvaluatorName_s, 
    Score = round(Score_d, 3), 
    Threshold = round(Threshold_d, 3),
    Severity = Severity_s
| order by Time desc
content.title: Failed Checks
content.noDataMessage: ✅ No failures in the selected time range!

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| summarize 
    Checks = count(), 
    Passed = countif(Passed_b == true), 
    Failed = countif(Passed_b != true), 
    ['Last Run'] = max(TimeGenerated),
    ['Avg Score'] = round(avg(Score_d), 3)
  by Project = FoundryProjectName_s, RunId = EvalRunId_s
| summarize arg_max(['Last Run'], *) by Project
| extend ['Pass Rate %'] = round(100.0 * Passed / Checks, 1)
| project ['Last Run'], Project, ['Avg Score'], ['Pass Rate %'], Checks, Passed, Failed
| order by ['Pass Rate %'] asc, ['Last Run'] desc
content.title: Latest Run Status by Project

content.query:
FoundryEvals_CL
| where TimeGenerated {TimeRange}
| where 'value::all' in ({Project}) or FoundryProjectName_s in ({Project})
| project
    Time = TimeGenerated,
    Project = FoundryProjectName_s,
    Target = TargetName_s,
    Evaluator = EvaluatorName_s,
    Category = EvaluatorCategory_s,
    Score = round(Score_d, 3),
    Threshold = round(Threshold_d, 3),
    Passed = Passed_b,
    Severity = Severity_s
| order by Time desc
content.title: All Evaluation Results
